result=True
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity) in ['attraction', 'airplane', 'train'] and activity_tickets(activity)!=1: result=False
  if innercity_transport_type(activity_transports(activity))=='metro'and metro_tickets(activity_transports(activity))!=1: result=False
nature_language: I am traveling alone from Beijing to Shenzhen for 3 days, with the following requirements: I want to try the restaurant Yude Longji Hakka Restaurant (Longhua Branch), and I also want to try one of the following types of restaurants: Bakery and Desserts.
